description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pkgdown that runs on pushes to master, main, docs*, cran-*, and r-* branches, and on pull requests to main and master branches, as well as on a scheduled cron job. The workflow uses an ubuntu-18.04 environment to install R and pkgdown dependencies, configure Git identity, install remotes and system dependencies, restore R package cache, and deploy the package to a branch or build the site.
